nodes.label: Tests for the typed SSE event payloads.  Each event model wraps a wire shape tha
OutputTextDeltaEvent dumps exactly the legacy raw-dict shape.
ReasoningStartedEvent has no fields beyond type.
OutputItemDoneEvent passes the inner item dict through verbatim.
HeartbeatEvent without timing metadata round-trips to just the     type — older
SessionHeartbeatEvent without server_time round-trips to just the type.      Wha
ElicitationRequestEvent matches approval.py:175 wire shape verbatim.
Initial + terminal envelope events embed a real ResponseObject.      Covers both
TypeAdapter routes raw dicts to the right typed model via type.
Each envelope event variant dispatches to its concrete class.      Covers initia
Discriminated union fails loud on type values it doesn't know.      A ``response
Each event raises ValidationError on a missing required field.      Catches regr
The MCP-standard ``message`` field is required (no implicit empty).

ElicitationRequestParams uses extra="allow" to mirror MCP.      MCP's ElicitRequ

Once assigned, sequence_number rides on the wire shape.
model=None without previous_response_id raises ValidationError (→ 422).      The
CreateResponseRequest constructs without error for all valid payload     shapes:
``git`` without ``host_id`` is rejected at validation (422).      Worktree creat
